enriched_points.expanded_content: 3D printing allows for precise, patient-specific customization, enhancing fit and reducing discomfort, ultimately leading to greater acceptance of the prosthetic device.
Advanced designs in 3D-printed prosthetics improve functional performance, enabling users to perform daily tasks more effectively and efficiently, as shown in recent studies.
Customized aesthetics and functionality significantly boost users' psychosocial wellbeing, leading to higher satisfaction rates with prosthetic devices, as evidenced by user feedback and evaluations.
